description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits significant distortion and curling, particularly along the margins. The overall leaf size appears reduced compared to a healthy, mature leaf. Texture appears slightly thickened and potentially leathery."} {"description": "No distinct, defined lesions are visible. However, there is a generalized chlorosis (yellowing) and a mottled appearance throughout the leaf. Areas of darker green suggest potential localized necrosis or altered chlorophyll content."} Symptoms are widespread across the entire leaf surface, with no clear pattern of localized infection. The distortion is most pronounced at the leaf margins and apex.
